bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 5 day(s) · scope=committee-chair (editorial — sees all) Items: 12 · Forecasts emitted: 1 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / diagnostician report, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-06-03 · [research_task] 核实万科股东大会及上海政策日期

DONE · owner=realestate-analyst

Verify actual date for 5/22 Vanke meeting and Shanghai policy wording ('no social security years') before publication per P2.

  • Outcome: research:000002.SZ → completed | dir=sessions/8aacb010-b904-4f25-a39b-9c85378d52a1 | summary: 000002.SZ 的投资主线不是传统“低估值地产龙头反转”，而是“信用修复、净资产可信度、减值尾部、销售回款、经营服务韧性”共同定价的资产负债表修复交易[自测算]。公司 2025 年营业收入为 2,334.3 亿元[S1]，归母净亏损为 885.6 亿元[S1]；2026 年一季度营业收入为 28,927,889,365.26 元[S2]，同比下降 23.86%[S2]，归母净利润为 -5,952,156,227.34 元[S2]，同比改善 4.71%[S2]。亏损收窄是正面信号，但合同销售金额 167.7 亿元[S2]、同…

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: 000002.SZ

2026-06-03 · [research_task] 跟踪 Lemon Sky Studios 美国上市及资本返还进展

IN_PROGRESS

关注 banker appointment、上市申请文件、股东批准文件或明确的资本返还方案的出现。参考报告 §3 '关键假设与验证条件'。

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-03 · [research_task] 监控 ICI 审计完成度与项目交付情况

IN_PROGRESS

跟踪 FY2024、1HFY2025 及 FY2025 审计进度，以及 Lemon Sky Studios 的项目交付与客户订单信号，以验证收益与毛利假设。参考报告 §5 '催化剂时间线'。

  • Status: in progress

IN_PROGRESS
